spec.description: Suitable for monitoring NVIDIA GPU resource overviews in AI intelligent computing scenarios. Dependent components: dcgm-exporter:3.3.0-3.2.0-ubuntu22.04, prometheus:v2.39.1, grafana:10.3.3

spec.expr: (sum(DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{pod!="",Hostname=~"$hostname"} * on (pod) group_left (host_ip) kube_pod_info) by (Hostname,host_ip))/(sum(DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{Hostname=~"$hostname"} * on (pod) group_left (host_ip) kube_pod_info) by (Hostname,host_ip)+sum(DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{Hostname=~"$hostname"} * on (pod) group_left (host_ip) kube_pod_info) by (Hostname,host_ip)) * 100

spec.title: GPU Compute Card Health Status & Version Information Overview
spec.description: Monitoring and displaying NVIDIA driver versions, chip types, GPU card health status, etc.

spec.title: GPU Compute Card Host Status & Version Information Overview
spec.description: Monitoring and displaying host kernel and OS versions, CPU and memory utilisation, and temperature

spec.expr:
avg by (nodename, host_ip) (
  label_replace(
    node_hwmon_temp_celsius
      * on(instance) group_left(nodename)
      node_uname_info{nodename=~"$hostname"},
    "host_ip", "$1", "instance", "([^:]+):.*"
  )
)

spec.title: AI Intelligent Computing - GPU Resource Monitoring Overview
